// BIOTECH TRACKING //

Log your dose.
See what works.

Track GLP-1 shots, weight, and phases.
No accounts. No ads. Local-first.

// SYSTEM NOTICE: TRACKING + EDUCATIONAL AWARENESS ONLY. GRID//NODE DOES NOT PROVIDE MEDICAL ADVICE.

Why GRID//NODE Exists

Protocol tracking is often spread across notes, screenshots, spreadsheets, calendars, and memory.

GRID//NODE begins with GLP-1 protocol tracking, then extends that record into a broader Personal Biotech Operating System for user-entered health protocol data.

The System

SHOTS

Record GLP-1 protocol events in a structured SHOTS history.

Log timing, locations, and notes so each user-entered SHOT adds signal to the rest of GRID//NODE.

Phase Engine

See educational protocol cycle visibility from your SHOTS history.

Phase Engine uses user-entered tracking data to estimate protocol progression, surface timing patterns, and support educational awareness without medical guidance.

RESULTS

Understand outcomes from your own recorded protocol history.

RESULTS turns logged SHOTS, weight, symptoms, and notes into outcome-tracking context over time.

LAB

Future tools for organizing protocol information safely.

LAB is planned as a restrained utility layer for calculators and educational tools, not medical direction.

NODE

Future pattern awareness across your personal biotech record.

NODE is planned to connect timing, tracking, outcomes, symptoms, and notes without becoming coaching or treatment guidance.

VAULT

Your secure personal data core.

VAULT keeps identity, protocol context, settings, and data ownership language tied to: Your body. Your data. Your grid.

SHOTS records.
Phase Engine interprets.
RESULTS measures.
LAB supports.
NODE connects.
VAULT protects.

Build Your Grid

Your shots, your weight, your phases. On your device, not in someone else's cloud.

For Oskar ♥

Early Access Coming Soon

GRID//NODE is currently in private prototype.

Early access requests will open soon as the system moves toward public testing.

Your body. Your data. Your grid.
Your body. Your data. Your grid.

WHY THIS PHASE

This phase estimate is based on:

  • Time since your last recorded shot
  • Logged protocol timing
  • User-entered protocol history

The estimate updates as new protocol events are recorded.

DATA SOURCES

Phase Engine estimates protocol progression using user-entered tracking records. It is educational and estimate-based.

  • Recorded shots
  • Protocol timing
  • Logged events
  • Protocol history
EDUCATIONAL INSIGHT ONLY
Phase Engine is not a laboratory measurement, diagnosis, treatment recommendation, or dosing guide.

Protocol continuity reflects logged event history, not medical compliance. Each logged SHOT contributes signal to your evolving protocol record.

EDUCATIONAL INSIGHT ONLY RESULTS displays logged measurements, user-entered outcomes, and personal tracking history. GRID//NODE becomes more informative as additional tracking data is recorded. GRID//NODE does not provide medical advice, treatment guidance, or dosing recommendations.

PEPTTirzepatide
31G
U-100
HEADROOM —
// TARGET
—
// VOLUME
— mL
// STATUS
READY
Educational math only. Enter dose and concentration.
T+0:00INJECT
ONSET~15min
PEAK2–4d
HALF~5d
HELP ME UNDERSTAND THIS MATH

Dose (mg) The dose amount entered by the user, measured in milligrams.

Concentration (mg/mL) How many milligrams are present in each milliliter of liquid, based on the user-entered vial label.

Volume (mL) The calculated liquid volume from dose divided by concentration.

Units For a U-100 syringe, 1 mL equals 100 units. Example: 0.50 mL equals 50 units.

Educational math and user-entered tracking only. GRID//NODE does not provide dosing recommendations. Medical decisions should be confirmed with a licensed clinician.

LOT GRN-2087-04A BUILD 0xA9F3…7E1C
STERILE · SINGLE USE U-100 INSULIN REFERENCE
FOR O. — SEE YOU IN THE NEXT RENDER.
// DOSE CHEAT SHEET
Using your entered concentration. Educational math only — not a recommendation.
DOSEUNITS
// MIX SOLUTION
// REFERENCE NOTES
Educational reference only. Follow licensed medical guidance and product instructions.
1
Record only user-entered protocol context. Do not use GRID//NODE as preparation guidance.
2
Reference volume: —.
3
Keep this as a personal reference note only; do not treat as handling instructions.
4
Use clinician/manufacturer instructions for handling. GRID//NODE does not validate preparation steps.
5
Storage and stability depend on product instructions and clinical guidance.
6
If anything appears inconsistent, pause and consult qualified guidance.

// DATA OWNERSHIP
Your body. Your data. Your grid.
VAULT stores user-entered settings and tracking context for the GRID//NODE experience.
This MVP stores tracking records locally in this browser unless exported or cleared by the user.
Archived SHOTS records are retained outside active SHOT HISTORY unless restored or permanently purged by the user.
Export tools are planned for data portability. Full VAULT export controls remain under development.
VAULT_LOCAL // RECORDS USER CONTROLLED
// SAFETY NOTICE
GRID//NODE provides educational tracking awareness only.
GRID//NODE does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, treatment recommendations, or dosing guidance.

ADD CONTEXT
REMOVE THIS MED?
This removes the medication record only. SHOTS history is unchanged.
VAULT_SAFE // SHOTS UNAFFECTED
ALL PHASES
ARCHIVE SHOTS RECORD?
This will move the record out of active SHOT HISTORY without deleting it.
VAULT_SAFE // RECORD RETAINED
DELETE ARCHIVED RECORD?
This will permanently remove this archived SHOTS record from local history. This action cannot be undone.
VAULT_WARNING // PERMANENT REMOVAL
FUTURE TIMESTAMP DETECTED
This SHOT record is dated ahead of the current system time. Continue only if this is intentional.
VAULT_CHECK // USER CONFIRMATION REQUIRED
SELECT SHOT DATE
